# browser-reviewed

## Class

external

## Purpose

Reviewed browser-oriented MCP assistance under the Phase 2 browser policy.

## Allowed Use

- read-oriented browsing with clear targets;
- navigation with reviewed non-sensitive payloads;
- external inspection without posting, deleting, purchasing, or uploads.

## Approval Boundary

Ask before form submission, upload, deletion, posting, purchase, settings changes, or sensitive outbound data.

## Rejection Cases

Reject use if the destination is hidden, the payload is unclear, or the requested action is write-like but framed as read-only.
